title: Extravagance
content:
There was a young girl named O'Neill,
     Who went up in the great Ferris wheel;
        But when half way around
        She looked at the ground,
     And it cost her an eighty-cent meal.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Extravagance"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
